titleStmt.title: SII 9.233: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 233. (A.R. No. 83 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE SANKARASVAMI TEMPLE AT ERADUKERA, KALYANADRUG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1060, Siddhārthi, Mārgaśira, śu. 5, Ādityavāra corresponding probably to A.D. 1139 November 27 Monday, not Sunday, as stated. Siddhārthi was Śaka 1061 expired. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva ruling from his capital Kalyāṇa, whose feudatory Iruṅgōḷa-Chōḷamahārāja was ruling from Goydavāḍi. The latter's Mahāpradhāna and Sēnādhipati Kētaṇa-Vergaḍe, noted for his charities, made a gift of a number of plots of land and of certain taxes (specified) for the service of the god Śaṅkaradēva at Eraḍukeṟe in Suḷiyanūru seventy, a sub-division of Sīre-nāḍu, and some vṛittis to Brāhmans and ascetics, after washing the feet of the teacher, Nāgarāsi-Paṇḍita. The names of some ascetics are given in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrīprithvīvalla
bhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmaja
gadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiThe letters vriddhi are written at the end of line 8.
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇa
da nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkhatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvara yoṟeyūrppuravarādhīśvara caturu
dadhimēkhaḷāḷaṁkritamahīvaḷayakṣatradhar(ṁ)mmācā
rapratipāḷana manuśvabhāva baṁṭarabāva madavaduvirō
dhipracaṁḍamaṁḍaḷikahridayasella nigaḷaṁkamalla nānāvidhā
rttitajanamanōratavitaraṇaviśśīma naralōkabhīma saraṇā
gatārātibhītamaṁḍaḷikara rakṣapāḷaka roddadēsagōpāḷaka
satyasaucapradipaṁnastitīkaraṇahariścaṁdra kāruṇyā
mritapūrṇnacaṁdra kaḷasācaḷōdbhūtasakaḷabhūtaḷapa
vitrīkritaprasannakāvērīvallabha bhayalōbha
durlabha catuśśaṣṭimaṁḍaḷikasiraskaṁḍana krīḍā
pariṇatapracaṁḍadōrddaṁḍana naralōkagaṁḍara
gaṁḍa samastabhuvanabhavanōdyōtitapratītadi
nakarānvayōdbhavādirājētyādināmāvaḷīvi
rājitarappa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraniruṁgōḷa
cōḷamahārājaru goydavāḍiya nelavīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samastarājyabharani
rūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamā
nōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayaguṇasaṁ
paṁna mridumadhuravibudhavacanaprasaṁna pradhānaka
rikaḷabhayūthanātha satyasaṁgrahaparijñātanāhā
rābhayebhaiśajyaśātradānavinōda mrigamadā
mōda cavuḍāṁbikāgarbhbharōhaṇagirīṁdranūtanā
narghgyamāṇikya nānānayōpāyacarccārccitacāṇi
kya bāhattaraniyōgayōgyatāyōgaṁdhara pa
tikāryyadhuraṁdhara dorvvārārātimaṁḍaḷikapradhānaśi
raḥkhaṁḍanavicitrakarapatra sujanajanamitrani
ruṁgōḷadēvarājyasamuddharaṇa vairisaṁharaṇa śrī
madaṟeyaśaṁkaradēvara divyaśrīpādārādhaka para
baḷasādhaka bhairavanagaṁdhavāraṇa ripumadanivā
raṇa nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati kētaṇavergga[*ḍe]yaru
svasti śrīrjjayaścābhyudayaśca sakavarṣa 1060
ne ya siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada mārggaśira śu 5 Ādi

tyavāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇapa
rvvanimittadiṁ sīrenāḍoḷagaṇa suḷiyanū
reppattaṟa baḷi yeraḍukeṟeya śaṁkaradēva
raṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōrddhālayakkaṁ
pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ snānanivēdyapūjenaṁdādī
vigega(ṁ)malliya tapōdhanarāhāradānakkama
lliyācāryya nāgarāsipaṁḍitara kālaṁ ka
rcci dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dati henno
ṇaṁbiya keṟeya hiṁde śaṁkaradēvariṁ ba
ḍagalu gadde khaṁḍuga 12 bhairasamudrada hiṁ
de gadde khaṁḍuga 12 yūriṁ paḍuvalu kariya
keyi mattaru 12 dēvariṁ mūḍalu kisuma
ttaru 24 kāniyiṁ mūḍalu tōṭa kamma 450
Aṁgaḍiyiṁ teṁka nivēśana 12 Aṁgaḍiyalu
ga bhattabhaṁḍiya bhatta koḷaga 1 Aḍake meḷasu suṁ
ṭhiyarisina jīrage bhattada hēṟintinisaṟaluṁ
hēṟiṁge vīsa 1 hēṟinalu Ele 100 nyāya
dalu mudrāpaṇa tippesuṁka rāsiya dēvago
ḷaga 2 gāṇadaleṇne soḷasige 1 mūlasthā
nadēvarige gadde khaṁḍuga 1 kisumatta 2 malli
kārjjunadēvarige gadde khaṁḍu 2 kisukeyi matta 2 tō
ṭa 1 gāṇa 1 Aṁgaḍiya benakaṁge gadde kha 1 kisu
keyi matta 2 kēdāradēvarige gadde khaṁḍuga 1 kisu
keyi matta 2 kāḷapriyadēvarige gadde khaṁḍuga
1 kisukeyi matta 2 jakkēsvaradēvarige gadde khaṁ 1 ka
riyakeyi matta 2 kisumatta 2 . sūtradhāri bū
cōjaṁgavātana ta(ṁ)mma mailōjaṁga bhairasamudrada
lu gadde khaṁḍuga 6 kariyakeyi matta 2 kisuke
yi matta 12 gāṇa 1 brahmapuri dēvaṇabhaṭṭari
ge gadde kha 2 kariyakeyi matta 1 kisukeyi ma
tta 2 nārasiṁghabhaṭṭaṁge gadde khaṁ 2 kariyakeyi matta
1 kisumatta 2 viṣṇubhaṭṭarige gadde khaṁ 2 kariyake
yi matta 1 kisukeyi matte 2 nāgadēvabhaṭṭaṁge ga
dde khaṁ 2 kariyakeyi matta 1 kisumatta 2 kaṇiya
kalla viṣṇubhaṭṭarige gadde khaṁḍu 2 sarvvadēvabhaṭṭarige ga
ddekhaṁḍu 2 Āḷvaṁge gadde ba 2 peddibhaṭṭaṁge gadde kha 2 kari
yakeyi matta 1 kisukeyi matta 2 vāsudēvabha
ṭṭaṁge gadde khaṁḍuga 2 kariyakeyi matta 1 kisuma
tta 2 rēvaṇabhaṭṭaṁge gadde khaṁ 2 kisumatta 2 Ādityabha
ṭṭarige gadde khaṁḍuga 2 kisumatta 2 sāvidēvabhaṭṭa
rige gadde khaṁḍuga 2 kisumatta 2 kēsavabhaṭṭarige ga
dde khaṁḍuga 2 kisukeyi matta 2 kannapayabhaṭṭaṁge
gadde khaṁ 2 kisu 2 veṁkaṇabhaṭṭaṁge gadde khaṁ 2 kisuma 2
Apaṇabhaṭṭargge gadde khaṁ 2 kisuma 2 cidaṇabha
ṭṭaṁge gadde khaṁ 2 kisuma 2 būcōja nivēsana 2
dēvālyatuṁbuva geydu haḍada .
svadattaṁ paradattajvā yō harēti vasuṁdhara .
śaṣṭirvvaruśasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi sāvanakuṁcaṭiga samudra-.Three inscription.
saṁkegoṁḍa mūleya malliseṭṭigeṁdu
koṭṭa śāsana . śrī sōmēśvara .
Digital edition of SII 9.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
